subcodes.first_line: O Samad! Thou wert mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One through verses that were sent down [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صمد قد کنت مذکورا لدی المظلوم بایات اذ نزلت
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
